   "reasoning": "We can't afford to throw more money at the schools without a clear plan for accountability and transparency. The attendance mandate will at least give us some data to work with, and the teacher incentives are a necessary evil. I'm hesitant to allocate more resources without a better understanding of how they're being used, but some new staff will help alleviate the burnout and the transparency report is a no-brainer if we're going to survive the next audit.",
